title: PROUVOST Dimitri
text:
About
Hello ! I am a MSc Finance student at HEC Lausanne, focused on Asset & Risk Management. My work sits at the intersection of empirical finance and quantitative methods from oil shock transmission modelling to carbon constrained portfolios. Available for an internship in Geneva starting January 2027.

title: PROUVOST Dimitri
text:
Research projects

Oil Shocks & Global Equity Markets
Regime-dependent OLS, VAR, and IRF analysis on global equity returns (1990–2026)
A 9,400-observation empirical study investigating whether oil price shocks have stronger negative effects on equity returns during economic downturns, and whether developed and emerging markets respond differently. Implemented Newey-West HAC inference, three VAR systems with bootstrapped impulse responses, and out-of-sample forecasting against Welch & Goyal (2008) benchmark.
Tech: Python (statsmodels, NumPy, Pandas) · MSc Finance, HEC Lausanne · 2026
